task_completion.description: The DICOM export dialog is opened in the DICOM viewer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box for exporting DICOM files is visible on the screen within the DICOM viewer application.

task_completion.description: The export destination path is set to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The export path in the dialog is explicitly set to '~/DICOM/exports/patient_cd' or '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/patient_cd'.

task_completion.description: The option to generate a DICOMDIR file is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A checkbox or setting for 'DICOMDIR' or 'Create DICOMDIR' is checked or enabled in the export dialog.

task_completion.description: A screenshot of the configured export dialog is saved to the correct path before completing the export.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot tool or terminal command is visible saving an image to '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/export_dialog.png' while the export dialog is open, or a file manager/terminal shows this file exists before the export completes.

task_completion.description: The export is completed and the DICOMDIR file is present in the destination folder alongside the DICOM images.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal shows the contents of '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/patient_cd', explicitly displaying the 'DICOMDIR' file and the exported DICOM images/folders.

integrity.description: The agent used the DICOM viewer's GUI to configure and perform the export.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show interaction with the DICOM viewer's export dialog, rather than terminal commands (like dcmmkdir) being used to perform the export or create the DICOMDIR.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely captured a screenshot of the export dialog.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used a screenshot utility or a valid command to capture the screen while the dialog was open, rather than creating a fake or empty file.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with a genuine DICOM viewer application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application shown is a real DICOM viewer with loaded medical images, not a mock interface or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected export directory is /home/ga/DICOM/exports/patient_cd. The DICOMDIR file must be generated at /home/ga/DICOM/exports/patient_cd/DICOMDIR. The screenshot of the export dialog must be saved to /home/ga/DICOM/exports/export_dialog.png. The DICOM data is synthetically generated with the patient ID CDTEST001.
